'''Charubah''' was a technology-oriented [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]], and famed for their [[Gun of Command|Guns of Command]] designed by [[Royal Armaments Guild of Charubah]].

{{Planet-stub}}
